name: Dashboard Design
description: Building clear, polished dashboards with strong visual hierarchy, useful filters, and decision-focused layouts.

name: Data Preparation
description: Cleaning, joining, reshaping, validating, and documenting data for analysis-ready workflows.

name: Business Storytelling
description: Turning analysis into narratives that explain what changed, why it matters, and what to do next.

name: Analytics Engineering
description: Applying SQL, data modeling, dbt concepts, and structured thinking to make datasets easier to trust and reuse.
